content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the car positioned slightly right of center, well within track boundaries and on course.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 58, target = 58 + 5 = 63
- Waypoint 63: (3.6881529092788696, 3.86673903465271)
- Car position: (4.375, 3.3255)
- Bearing = atan2(3.8667 - 3.3255, 3.6882 - 4.375) = atan2(0.5412, -0.6868)
- = 180 - atan2(0.5412, 0.6868) = 180 - 38.22° = 141.78°
- Current heading: 140.39°
- Delta = 141.78 - 140.39 = +1.39° → essentially straight, nearly on the line

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves gently left ahead, delta to waypoint 63 is only +1.39° which is well under 5°, so the car is essentially on the waypoint line — using steering_angle=0 to avoid oscillation.",

    "Track has a left-curving section around waypoints 55-70, heading southwest",
    "Car is consistently slightly right of center (~0.19m) but within safe margin (track width 0.76m)",
    "Full circuit ~17.7m, speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for moderate curves",
    "Use steering_angle=0 for |delta| <5° to avoid oscillation on near-straight sections",
    "Delta near +5-9° means gentle left correction — use steering_angle=5",
    "Car is maintaining 1.5 speed well through this section",
    "Waypoints 60-70 show continuing left curve (south-southwest)",
    "Heading ~140°, track continues curving left toward waypoints 65-70",
    "5° steering is appropriate for delta 5-10° range to avoid overshoot",
    "When delta drops below 5°, immediately switch to 0 steering to prevent oscillation"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [4.6133, 4.534, 4.458, 4.375],
    "y": [3.1285, 3.1977, 3.2609, 3.3255],
    "yaw": [140.033, 139.698, 139.804, 140.394]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": 1.39,
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 0.0
}
```
